justification: All pass criteria met: Bird's missing output is explicitly detected ('marked as task status completed but no actual output was received'), formal escalation stops synthesis with clear recommendation 'Do not proceed', no handoff brief is produced, escalation clearly states what is missing (domain rules, acceptance criteria, correctness definitions) and why it matters (cannot validate MJ's architecture, Shaq would implement domain-incorrect feature), and no domain content is invented.

observations.text: Explicit detection that Bird's task shows completed but no output was received
Formal escalation with structured type, description, options, and recommendation — not just an informal note
Clear 'Do not proceed' recommendation that halts synthesis
Detailed articulation of what is missing and why it blocks synthesis — domain rules, acceptance criteria, correctness definitions
Low confidence areas enumerate specific domain questions that Bird should answer, without guessing answers
No handoff brief produced — output is purely an escalation
Confidence level appropriately low at 30, reflecting inability to synthesize without Bird's input
